properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v3 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's a call going out Across the land in every nation A call to those who swear allegiance to the cross of Christ A call to true humility, to live our live responsibly To deepen our devotion to the cross at any price

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let us then be sober, moving only in the Spirit As aliens and strangers in a hostile foreign land The message we're proclaiming is repentance and forgiveness The offer of salvation to a dying race of man

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: To love the Lord our God Is the heartbeat of our mission The spring from which our service overflows Across the street Or around the world The mission's still the same Proclaim and live the Truth In Jesus' name

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: As a candle is consumed by the passion of the flame Spilling light unsparingly throughout a darkened room Let us burn to know Him deeper Then our service flaming bright Will radiate his passions And blaze with holy light

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: To love the Lord our God Is the heartbeat of our mission The spring from which our service overflows Across the street Or around the world The mission's still the same… Proclaim and live the Truth In Jesus' name
